title: Market volatility: Why instinct alone is not enough in market decision-making
summary: Equities fall 10 to 20% in almost every calendar year. And yet, over the last 46 years, 37 of those years have still closed positive. Over any rolling 7-year period in Indian equity markets, there have been zero instances of negative returns.

title: ₹8,500 crore inflows in a month: Why multi-asset allocation is winning big in FY26
summary: The investor who started a SIP into a multi-asset fund two years ago didn't need to predict interest rates or time gold's rally or call the bottom on small-caps. The fund did the navigating.

title: Growth vs dividend option in equity mutual funds explained: Which one should you choose?
summary: While growth allows you to reap the benefits of compounding, the dividend option, which is now called IDCW (Income Distribution cum Capital Withdrawal) provides you with regular income.

title: Nothing ever happens. That’s why most traders lose
summary: An open-source bot that blindly bets “No” on every prediction is quietly outperforming most traders. The lesson for F&amp;O punters and active investors is deeply uncomfortable.

title: Market slump hits SIP returns. Time to worry or stay put?
summary: As markets slide and short-term SIP returns turn negative, should investors hit pause — or let rupee cost averaging do its job?

title: ITR Deadlines: A complete guide to filing, penalties, and correction windows
summary: The Income Tax Department has notified ITR forms for AY 2026-27. Taxpayers can file belated, revised, or updated returns. Key deadlines for advance tax and TDS payments are crucial for compliance to avoid penalties and interest.

title: Can capital gains on stocks be shown as business income to avoid tax if total income is under ₹12 lakh?
summary: Reclassifying trading profits as business income may lower tax liabilities for some investors. This classification depends on factors such as trading frequency and intent. Taxpayers must consistently apply their chosen classification to avoid disputes with the Income Tax Department during audits.

title: Overtime rules in India: What the new labour codes say about your rights
summary: India's new labour codes consolidate 29 laws into four, establishing rules for working hours, overtime pay, and worker protections. Employers must pay double for overtime, and all workers, regardless of designation, are entitled to wage protections.&nbsp;

title: US Child Tax Credit: What to expect in 2026
summary: The Child Tax Credit provides a dollar-for-dollar reduction in tax liability for dependents under 17. The OBBB introduces a maximum credit of $2,200 per child for 2026, with unchanged income limits and specific IRS requirements for claiming.

title: Why US Social Security payout will be delayed in May 2026? When will the payments come?
summary: Social Security payments for May will be delayed due to the calendar, not policy changes. Payments will be issued on May 13, 20, and 27 based on recipients' birthdates.&nbsp;

title: Stock Market Holiday: NSE, BSE to remain shut one day this week. Check upcoming market holidays
summary: Indian stock markets will remain closed on Friday, May 1, on account of Maharashtra Day, marking the first trading holiday of the month. With this, a total of nine market holidays remain in 2026, including upcoming closures for Bakri Id, Muharram, and Diwali.

title: IDFC First Bank Q4 profit up 5% on lower provisions; fraud hits ops 42%
summary: IDFC First Bank reported a modest 5% rise in Q4 net profit, aided by a 40% decline in provisions. However, a Rs 645-crore fraud at its Chandigarh branch sharply dented operating performance, leading to a 42% drop in operating profit after the bank fully expensed the impact during the quarter.

title: Uco Bank Q4 profit jumps 23% on lower provisions; margins dip
summary: State-owned Uco Bank reported a 23% rise in Q4 net profit to Rs 801 crore, aided by lower provisions, though operating profit declined due to weaker core and non-interest income. Net interest margin slipped to 3%, even as advances grew 19.4% and deposits rose 11.6%.

title: US Fed set to hold rates steady again on cost hikes from Mideast war
summary: The US central bank is widely expected to keep interest rates unchanged at its policy meeting next week, as energy prices stay high and supply chains snarled due to war in the Middle East.

title: 14 penny stocks surge up to 125% in a month; 2 turn multibaggers. Did you own any?

title: IDFC First Bank Q4 Results: PAT grows 5% YoY to Rs 319 crore; NII up 16%
summary: IDFC First Bank announced its financial results for the March quarter of FY26. The bank's standalone net profit saw a 5% increase compared to the previous year. Net interest margins experienced a slight dip. Interest income grew by 12%, while net interest income rose by 16%. Customer business expand
